sourceSummary: 11 features, 24 UI surfaces, 11 operation chains. GitHub items read: 12; private issues read: 6; dashboard discussions read: 1.

pages.summary: 发布需求或已有项目，AI 辅助整理成可协作的公开卡片。

sections.description: 输入需求、上传材料、AI 初审、回答追问、生成草稿、选择标签并发布。

items.summary: 上传文件或补充材料说明

pages.summary: 需求 / 项目详情、评论、支持、私聊、作品提交与社区评价。

sections.description: 展示目标、场景、输入输出、验收标准和状态。

items.summary: 需求或项目的结构化描述

items.summary: 支持、加赏、曝光和支持者讨论

items.label: 提交作品
items.summary: 开发者提交方案或作品

pages.title: 我的
pages.summary: 我的发布、工作台、参与、通知、火柴账户和设置。

sections.title: 个人工作台
sections.description: 查看自己的发布、参与、待处理和项目管理。

steps.label: 围绕详情进行评论和回复
填写项目名称、阶段、链接和媒体
支持项目或进入支持者讨论

chains.title: 详情评论与私聊操作链
火柴支持与账本操作链

steps.label: 查看火柴账户余额和权益

features.title: Private alpha account login
features.summary: Email, phone, QQ, and WeChat-style alpha login entry with account-password simulation.
operationChain: Profile or admin shell renders allowed view
features.discussionPrompt: Which real OAuth or verification flow should be introduced first without breaking alpha account testing?

features.title: Requirement publishing workflow
features.summary: Requirement posting flow with materials, AI review, follow-up questions, draft generation, tags, save, and publish.
operationChain: AI or mock review returns questions
Server publishes posting to display board
features.discussionPrompt: Which parts of the publishing funnel need clearer review states before adding payment or external AI usage?

features.title: Project posting workflow
features.summary: Existing project publication with GitHub/demo/media information, project stage, tags, interest, cooperation, and comments.
operationChain: Other users signal interest or cooperation
Comments and support update project detail
features.discussionPrompt: Should project versions and release notes become a first-class operation chain?

features.title: Unified display board
features.summary: Unified requirement and project discovery with hot, rising, type, search, and tag filters.
features.discussionPrompt: Which ranking signals should be made transparent for alpha users?

features.title: Posting detail, comments, and participation
features.summary: Requirement/project detail views with comments, nested discussion, user profile entry, participation, and work submission context.
operationChain: Profile and private message entry points become available
features.discussionPrompt: Should comments, works, and messages be separated visually for less crowded detail pages?

features.title: Private message threads
features.summary: Private messages with a first-three-message limit and reply-based unlock model.
features.discussionPrompt: What moderation evidence should be visible to admins without exposing private content publicly?

features.title: Match support and wallet
features.summary: Test match balance, project support, requirement bounty increase, membership, AI quota, exposure purchases, and support discussion group.
operationChain: User spends matches on support or exposure
features.discussionPrompt: The next expansion point is spending history: finish API, DB query, client history UI, admin filters, and QA.

features.title: Profile, workbench, and notifications
features.summary: User profile area with my posts, participation, pending work, notifications, public profile, settings, and export actions.
operationChain: Client loads my posts, participation, notifications, and wallet
Server returns current user scoped data
features.discussionPrompt: Should pending tasks become a richer cross-feature inbox before public alpha?

features.title: Alpha admin operations
features.summary: Admin dashboard, users, postings, AI usage, match support, content review, file review, and production readiness views.
operationChain: Admin reviews users, content, files, wallet, or readiness
features.discussionPrompt: Which admin decisions need audit-log evidence before inviting more testers?

features.title: AI requirement assistant
features.summary: Mock or DeepSeek requirement review, question generation, draft generation, tags, usage limits, and production AI evidence.
operationChain: Server runs mock or DeepSeek review
features.discussionPrompt: What evidence should be required before switching from mock AI to real AI in broader alpha?

features.title: Public async feature dashboard
features.summary: Public dashboard for implemented features, missing work, UI surfaces, operation chains, handoffs, async comments, and AI review queues.
operationChain: Team members submit ideas, evaluations, and handoff requests from the dashboard
Discussion entries are stored as public GitHub Issues or comments
Collector reads GitHub Project, private issues, dashboard issues, and comments when token is available
Static dashboard renders feature map, discussion signals, and AI review queue
features.discussionPrompt: Which discussion signals should become implementation tasks, and which older comments should be marked stale?

signals.title: [Change request][public-feature-dashboard] Dashboard async discussion workflow
signals.preview: Feature ID: public-feature-dashboard Feature: Public async feature dashboard Discussion type: change-request Target UI surfaces: - Public feature dashboard (feature-dashboard /)...
